results.title: INDIA JANBANDHAN 23 PARTIES CONFIRMED PARTICIPATION POLITICAL PARTIES CONGRESS LEADER JAIRAM RAMESH
results.description: നാളെ നടക്കാനിരിക്കുന്ന യോഗത്തിൽ ഇരുപത്തിമൂന്ന് രാഷ്ട്രീയ പാർട്ടികൾ പങ്കെടുക്കുമെന്നും വ്യക്തിപരമായോ മറ്റ് രാഷ്ട്രീയപരമായോ ആയ കാരണങ്ങളാൽ ചില പാർട്ടികൾക്ക് ഈ യോഗത്തിൽ പങ്കെടുക്കാൻ കഴിയില്ലെന്നും കോൺഗ്രസ്.

results.title: PoK on brink of widespread unrest as JAAC calls for lockdown protest over unmet demands
results.description: According to a statement issued by the JK-JAAC in October last year, state forces and non-local personnel carried out indiscriminate firing, killing at least nine unarmed civilians and injuring hundreds more.

results.title: Team India bowlers wreak havoc; Afghanistan reach 113 runs at stumps on Day 2
results.description: Team India`s Manav Suthar concluded Day 2 with the figures of three wickets for 21 runs in 15.5 overs. Prasidh Krishna has also claimed two wickets

results.title: 'INDIA janbandhan' united, 23 parties have confirmed participation: Congress
results.description: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh said there are some parties that have expressed their inability to attend this particular meeting for their own reasons.

results.title: Mumbai: Photo Of Man Sleeping On Moving Metro In Aqua Line Sparks Civic Sense Debate
results.description: A photo showing a man sleeping across four seats inside Mumbai Metro 3 Aqua Line has sparked discussion online about civic sense and commuter behaviour. While the coach appeared relatively empty, many questioned whether occupying multiple seats in a shared public space should be normalised in the city’s newest metro service.
